modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about evacuation and severe weather plans for Akeley - Lawrence Science Center.

full_description_text:  
I just got a call from someone asking about the evacuation plan for the Akeley - Lawrence Science Center. They also wanted to know what the severe weather plan is for that building. It seems like they’re looking for clear information on what to do in case of an emergency or bad weather.
short_description: Inquiry about evacuation and severe weather plans for Akeley - Lawrence Science Center.
description: I just got a call from someone asking about the evacuation plan for the Akeley - Lawrence Science Center. They also wanted to know what the severe weather plan is for that building.
